title: groov e Wired Optical Mouse - Computer Accessories for Laptops and PCs, Ergonomic Design, USB Connection, Compact Mouse - Black
features: WIRED MOUSE - Upgrade your computing setup with the Groov-e Wired Mouse and redefine how you work and play; elevate your navigating experience with a touch of modern convenience
PLUG & PLAY - Made to meet the standards of modern convenience, this mouse uses an integrated USB cable to connect to your PC or laptop; there are no hassles, setups or installs, simply plug and play

ERGONOMIC DESIGN - This computer accessory offers an ergonomic design to provide users with a comfortable and versatile experience for optimal performance, a compact mouse with smooth tracking and scrolling
OPTICAL MOUSE - The mouse features a simple design with a scroll wheel and uses an optical sensor to ensure smooth and accurate tracking on a variety of surfaces for optimal performance

RELIABLE CONNECTION - The computer peripheral uses a standard USB connector to ensure you have an uninterrupted and reliable connection that avoids any input delays and provides high-speed communication between your PC and the input device
description: From the manufacturer Optical Mouse The mouse has a simple design with a scroll wheel and optical sensor for smooth, accurate tracking on various surfaces. USB connection Designed for modern convenience, this keyboard has an integrated USB cable for easy connection to your PC or laptop.
